Title: Authorizes a discontinuance without an order in actions where an unrepresented party has not responded to a request for a stipulation
Summary: Allows a party asserting a claim to discontinue an action without procedural delays when the discontinuance would benefit an unrepresented party and that party has not responded to a request to stipulate to a discontinuance in a reasonable period of time.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the civil practice law and rules, in relation to authorizing a discontinuance without an order in actions where an unrepresented party has not responded to a request for a stipulation
